name: Flash Marriage Love
original_name: 闪婚成宠：总裁上司是老公
overview:
A cold-faced CEO falls in love with a "married" secretary and becomes incredibly jealous! He constantly dreams of being a mistress and scolds his secretary's "incompetent husband," who doesn't even realise it's his name written on her marriage certificate!

The two were separated for two years after their flash marriage due to his trip. When they reunited, they met in the workplace and he didn't recognise her due to his face blindness. Jiang Nan Xi concealed her identity and entered Lu Zhi Xing's company as a secretary. The two gradually developed feelings for each other during their workplace interactions. During this period, the truth about their identities is revealed.

trailers.title: 一口氣看完【閃婚成寵：總裁上司是老公】冷麵總裁戀上’已婚‘秘書狂吃醋！天天想當男小三，罵遍秘書的"無能老公"竟不知她結婚証上冩的是自己名字！
I Made My CEO Husband Jealous… Of Himself! (The Secretary He Fell For Was His Wife All Along)
【ENG SUB】女孩和便宜老公纏綿一夜 怕身份暴露落荒而逃，她隱藏身份做了他的貼身秘書，又純又欲撩得總裁心動不已，殊不知她是與自己結婚2年的妻子！#drama #甜劇 #都市劇 #minidrama
【马天宇💕田熙雯】《闪婚成宠：总裁上司是老公》女孩和便宜老公纏綿一夜後落荒而逃，她隱藏身份做了他的貼身秘書，又純又欲撩得總裁心動不已，殊不知她是自己結婚2年的妻子！#短剧 #爱情 #霸道总裁 #甜宠
